zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermentrude de Bourgogne於1058年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易布格時，她的父親Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne39歲，母親Étiennette de Longwy-Metz24歲。她於大約1076年與Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1104年3月8日在法國布格姆a康乃斯享年46歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易奧圖。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ermentrude de Bourgogne于1058年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易布格时，她的父亲Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne39岁，母亲Étiennette de Longwy-Metz24岁。她于大约1076年与Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar在法国諾門迪结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1104年3月8日在法国布格姆a康乃斯享年46岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易奧圖。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Ermentrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, adopted from Old French by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It is derived from erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’ + traut ‘beloved’. It did not survive long into the Middle Ages, but was occasionally revived in the 18th and 19th centuries. It is now completely out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermentrude de Bourgogne was born in 1058, in Bourgogne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, was 39 and her mother, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, was 24. She married Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar about 1076, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 8 March 1104, in Mâconnais, Burgundy, France, at the age of 46, and was buried in Autun, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ermentrude de Bourgogne est née en 1058, à Bourgogne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar environ 1076, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 mars 1104, à Mâconnais, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Autun, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ermentrude de Bourgogne 1058 in Bourgogne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne 39 und ihre Mutter Étiennette de Longwy-Metz 24. Sie hat um 1076 in Normandie, Frankreich Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. März 1104 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Mâconnais, Burgund, Frankreich und wurde in Autun, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ermentrude de Bourgogne è nata il nel 1058 nel Bourgogne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar circa 1076, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 marzo 1104, nel Mâconnais, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Autun, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ermentrude de Bourgogneが1058年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーボウルゴグンで生まれた時，父Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogneは39歳，母Étiennette de Longwy-Metzは24歳であった。約1076年にフランスノーマンディでThierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Barと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1104年3月8日にフランスボウルゴグンムaコナイスで46歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーアウトゥンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ermentrude de Bourgogne(이)가 1058년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 부르고그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Étiennette de Longwy-Metz(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1076년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1104년 3월 8일 프랑스 부르고그니 a콘아이에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 오툰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ermentrude de Bourgogne nasceu em 1058, em Bourgogne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar aproximadamente 1076, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de março de 1104, em Mâconnais, Bourgogne, França, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Autun, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ermentrude de Bourgogne родилась в 1058 г. в местности бургогн, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar около 1076 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 8 марта 1104 г. в местности мaконнеи, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности аучунь, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

sm.from 1076 to 1078: mai le 1076 e o'o I le 1078

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ermentrude de Bourgogne nació en 1058, en Bourgogne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar aproximadamente 1076, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de marzo de 1104, en Mâconnais, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Autun, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
